# Cedar Marsh Boardwalk

- **Length:** 2.4 km out-and-back
- **Gain:** negligible
- **Surface:** boardwalk over wetland

Flat, slow, and birdy. The far channel is where the
[Great Blue Heron](../species/birds/great-blue-heron.md) hunts; the cedars at
the turnaround are [Barred Owl](../species/birds/barred-owl.md) territory. Later
in summer the [cardinal flower](../species/plants/cardinal-flower.md) blooms
right off the rail.

## Walks here

- [2026-05-09](../daily/2026-05-09.md)
- [2026-06-01](../daily/2026-06-01.md)
